datasets.name: top_merchants
queryLines:
SELECT
  merchant_name,
  merchant_category,
  COUNT(*) as transaction_count,
  SUM(amount) as total_amount,
  AVG(amount) as avg_amount
FROM
  finguard.silver.transactions
GROUP BY
  merchant_name,
  merchant_category
ORDER BY
  transaction_count DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: high_value_transactions
queryLines:
SELECT
  transaction_timestamp,
  customer_id,
  merchant_name,
  merchant_category,
  amount,
  currency,
  country,
  is_international,
  status
FROM
  finguard.silver.transactions
WHERE
  amount > 100000
ORDER BY
  transaction_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

measures.name: international_count
measures.expr: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_international = true THEN 1 END)

measures.name: international_transactions
measures.expr: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_international = true THEN 1 END)

measures.name: total_declined_amount
measures.expr: SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'APPROVED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)

measures.name: alert_rate
measures.expr: COUNT(CASE WHEN status != 'APPROVED' OR is_international = true OR amount > 100000 THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)

measures.name: high_risk_count
measures.expr: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_international = true OR amount > 100000 THEN 1 END)

datasets.name: top_customers
queryLines:
SELECT
  t.customer_id,
  c.customer_segment,
  c.risk_score,
  COUNT(*) as transaction_count,
  SUM(t.amount) as total_spent,
  AVG(t.amount) as avg_transaction
FROM
  finguard.silver.transactions t
    LEFT JOIN finguard.silver.customers c
      ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY
  t.customer_id,
  c.customer_segment,
  c.risk_score
ORDER BY
  transaction_count DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: segment_performance
queryLines:
SELECT
  c.customer_segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.customer_id) as active_customers,
  COUNT(*) as transaction_count,
  SUM(t.amount) as total_revenue,
  AVG(t.amount) as avg_transaction,
  AVG(c.risk_score) as avg_risk_score
FROM
  finguard.silver.transactions t
    LEFT JOIN finguard.silver.customers c
      ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY
  c.customer_segment
ORDER BY
  total_revenue DESC

measures.name: alert_count
measures.expr: COUNT(CASE WHEN status != 'APPROVED' OR is_international = true OR amount > 100000 THEN 1 END)

measures.name: alert_percentage
measures.expr: COUNT(CASE WHEN status != 'APPROVED' OR is_international = true OR amount > 100000 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

datasets.name: customer_risk_analysis
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN risk_score < 30 THEN 'Low Risk'
    WHEN risk_score < 60 THEN 'Medium Risk'
    WHEN risk_score < 80 THEN 'High Risk'
    ELSE 'Critical Risk'
  END as risk_category,
  COUNT(*) as customer_count,
  AVG(risk_score) as avg_risk_score,
  AVG(annual_income) as avg_income
FROM
  finguard.silver.customers
GROUP BY
  risk_category
ORDER BY
  avg_risk_score

lines:
## Finguard Financial Analytics

Comprehensive view of transaction performance, customer insights, and financial metrics

## 🚨 Risk & Alert Monitoring

Real-time tracking of declined transactions, high-value activities, and international transfers

## 👥 Customer Risk & Behavior Analysis

In-depth customer segmentation, risk distribution, and spending patterns

## 📊 Transaction Patterns & Insights

Detailed breakdown by type, time, location, and payment methods
